mapper.select: SELECT t.id AS id, t.title AS title, t.content AS content, t.remark AS remark, t.direct_owner_type AS directOwnerType, t.direct_owner_id AS directOwnerId, CASE WHEN t.direct_owner_type = 'PROJECT' THEN p.title WHEN t.direct_owner_type = 'GOAL' THEN g.title WHEN t.direct_owner_type = 'NODE' THEN n.title WHEN t.direct_owner_type = 'INDEPENDENT' THEN '独立待办' END AS ownerName, t.status_template_id AS statusTemplateId, t.current_status_id AS currentStatusId, s.status_code AS statusCode, s.status_name AS statusText, t.plan_start_time AS planStartTime, t.plan_end_time AS planEndTime, t.deadline_time AS deadlineTime, t.actual_start_time AS actualStartTime, t.completed_at AS completedAt, t.update_time AS updateTime FROM mobe_task_item t LEFT JOIN mobe_project p ON t.direct_owner_type = 'PROJECT' AND p.id = t.direct_owner_id AND p.user_id = t.user_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN mobe_goal g ON t.direct_owner_type = 'GOAL' AND g.id = t.direct_owner_id AND g.user_id = t.user_id AND g.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN mobe_node n ON t.direct_owner_type = 'NODE' AND n.id = t.direct_owner_id AND n.user_id = t.user_id AND n.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN mobe_task_status s ON s.id = t.current_status_id AND s.is_deleted = 0 WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.user_id = #{userId} AND t.is_deleted = 0
